Game icons used in Ollie Gives, Ollie Takes

Source: https://game-icons.net
License: CC BY 3.0
Primary author for the icons used here: Lorc (https://lorcblog.blogspot.com)

Downloaded transparent SVG variants used in this project:
- crossed-swords.svg
- swords-emblem.svg
- sword-smithing.svg
- locked-chest.svg
- campfire.svg
- crowned-skull.svg
- sun.svg
- moon.svg

Attribution format recommended by Game-icons.net:
"Icons made by Lorc and available on https://game-icons.net"
